modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't see my timesheets in the experience portal.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to check my timesheets because I need to put in my hours for the month. But then, it just wouldn’t let me see them at all. I got this weird error that said something about an External System ID not found, which sounds really confusing. I just want to enter my hours, but it’s like the portal is playing hide and seek with my timesheets!
short_description: Can't see my timesheets in the experience portal.
description: So, I was trying to check my timesheets because I need to put in my hours for the month. But then, it just wouldn’t let me see them at all. I just want to enter my hours, but it’s like the portal is playing hide and seek with my timesheets!
